title: pavonia serrana
intro: Pavonia serrana, also known as Pavonia odorata, is a type of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae), native to Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Pavonia serrana include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as acne, wounds, and eczema. In herbal preparations, Pavonia serrana is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be applied directly to the affected area to reap its medicinal benefits.
